name: leakage-controlled-benchmark-multi-source-stock-prediction
description: Protocol-locked benchmark for multi-source next-day stock prediction: availability-timed derived feature datasets for five source families (price technical indicators, news sentiment statistics, social media day-level aggregates, publication-lagged macroeconomic series, public sector graphs) over 55 liquid US large-caps, 2015-02-03 to 2023-12-31, with five expanding chronological folds, a tuned price-only reference baseline, naive/classical anchors, and reference results from 2,468 controlled runs. Raw third-party text and proprietary classifications are not redistributed (see DATA-STATEMENTS.md).

distribution.name: results
distribution.description: Committed reference results (CSV): direction/volatility grids, leakage-free macro re-runs, harness-native single-state reference cells, sector-graph equivalence arms, naive anchors, audit diagnostics.

distribution.name: macro-raw
distribution.description: Public-domain FRED federal series (business-day resampled, original and publication-lag-corrected) + FOMC dates.

distribution.name: derived-features
distribution.description: Per-stock-day derived feature tables for the five source families (DOI-archived deposit on acceptance; regeneration scripts included in this repository).

recordSet.name: stock-days
recordSet.description: ~124k per-stock-day rows (55 tickers x 2,239 trading days); primary label = next-day direction under a symmetric 0.5% dead-zone applied to train/validation/test alike; secondary label = next-day realized volatility; five expanding chronological folds with July-to-June test windows from 2019-07-01 to 2023-12-31 (the last a six-month stub).

field.name: news_features
field.description: 11 FinBERT sentiment statistics, T-1 aligned, 52/55 names covered

field.name: social_features
field.description: 17 StockTwits day-level aggregates + has-data flag; coverage ends 2022-12-30

field.name: macro_features
field.description: 5 federal series at publication dates + FOMC flag
